violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Yogurt parfaits and corn were prepped then placed in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep and covered. Cooling procedures reviewed with staff at the time of inspection. Foods uncovered and moved to shallow containers into walk-in freezer to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the interior and exterior of the refrigeration units and hand-washing station in the raw chicken prep areas have an accumulation of food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
